name: Casa de España
message: www.casadeespana.do https://www.zoominfo.com/c/casa-de-espan%CC%83a/476166997 Casa de España, located in Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic, is a premier private social and cultural club dedicated to preserving Spanish heritage and fostering community ties. The club features extensive facilities, including multiple dining venues like Restaurante Sancho and La Taberna, professional-grade soccer fields, and recreational areas such as the "Camino de la Salud" fitness path.
